experiences.intentions: Active T is near the top center with open space below until it reaches the stack around row 4-6. The current stack is uneven but there is no immediate danger at the spawn area. Goal is to place the T efficiently while setting up future J/S/L/T pieces and avoiding creating overhangs. A quick downward move is best to advance toward a useful placement; lateral/rotation choices can be made after descending since there is plenty of horizontal freedom now. Hard drop would commit too early without aligning, while no_op wastes time.
experiences.tasks: Clear as many lines as possible in Tetris by placing tetrominoes strategically.
